identity.name: Fable Jack
identity.story: Grows them short and legal now. Inspects any vine over knee height with a licensed axe.

relationships.kind: inspects him annually; both pretend it isn't personal

they disagree about what counts as knee height, three seasons running over the same stubborn half-inch — until this morning's notch came back flush with the law for the first time either of them can remember, and three seasons of arguing never once told him what an inspection is for once it stops coming back wrong

child.label: the annual inspection, kept on schedule

children.label: inspecting Old Thorn first, the one appointment neither of them will call personal

measuring the morning's growth against the notch he and Bramble Rose have argued over for three seasons — and finding it flush with his own knee-height law for the first time either of them can remember, no half-inch left to dispute

chalking today's true reading into the ledger same as any other, and finding the chalk doesn't want to move — three seasons of arguing the half-inch were never really about the half-inch, and he's got nothing left to measure against her with

child.label: pruning anything with clouds in mind
